---
title: "Oracle 19c Database Health Check Report"
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.qmd
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 1
    toc-location: right
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    other-links:
      - text: "PDF Version"
        href: "dbhc_report.pdf"
        icon: file-pdf
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  out-width: 100%
  fig-align: center
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
is_html = True
is_pdf = False
```

{{< include _core_content.qmd >}}
